headline: Bloom Energy, Astera Labs, Alnylam, Reddit Could Be Among Next Adds to S&P 500
summary: There were two additions to the  index unveiled on Friday—  Marvell Technology  and  Flex  (formerly Flextronics)—and that raises the question which companies could be next to gain admission into the highly desired index.  S&P Dow Jones Indices, which oversees the  has a host of criteria including market value, domicile, profitability and corporate structure.  Bloom Energy Astera Labs Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Heico Rocket Cos  and  Reddit  look like potential additions because they are among the largest companies by market capitalization that meet the index’s other criteria.

headline: Is Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Now Attractive After Steep Multi Year Share Price Decline
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Builders FirstSource at around US$73.64 is starting to look interesting on valuation, or if the recent weakness is a warning sign that should not be ignored. The stock has fallen 2.6% over the past week, 4.9% over the last month, and 29.6% year to date, with a 34.8% decline over the past year and a 40.5% decline over three years. Over five years, however, the total return sits at 72.8%. Recent coverage of Builders FirstSource has focused on how the share...
